campaign.name: Ember Roast — Fall Single-Origin Launch
campaign.targetAudience: Specialty coffee enthusiasts 28-45, craft-focused, appreciate origin storytelling and small-batch roasters
campaign.tone: warm, artisanal, intimate, slow-living, golden-hour cinematic

products.name: Ember Roast — Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
products.description: Small-batch single-origin from the Yirgacheffe region. Bright citrus, jasmine florals, honey finish. Roasted weekly in Portland.

products.name: Ember Roast — Colombia Huila
products.description: Washed-process Colombia Huila. Caramel sweetness, milk chocolate body, mandarin acidity. A crowd-pleasing daily drinker with pour-over clarity.
keyFeatures: tasting notes: caramel, milk chocolate, mandarin
